productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Solid Beige Shorts
description: Composition Beige shorts made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with insert pockets on the sides, welt pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, brand patch appliqued on the right hip over the pocket, comfortable waistband with loops and a drawstring on the inside, and has a buttoned closure on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry medium Medium hot iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Rugged and masculine, these beige shorts from status quo give you an edgy look. The welt pockets on the back with buttoned flaps and buttoned closure on the front adds interesting brand detailing. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team it with t-shirts. Model statistics The model wears shorts of length 21" Height: 6'; Waist: 32"
